info.name: OpenSRE Self-Hosted API
info.description:
Collection for testing the self-hosted OpenSRE API server (no LangGraph Platform license required).

Base URL: http://localhost:8000

request.description: Returns {ok: true} if the server is running.
Returns detailed health: graph_loaded, llm_configured, version, env.

item.name: Investigate - Bid Ask Decorator Kafka Errors

request.description:
One-shot investigation: creates thread + runs investigation + returns result in a single call.

This is the simplest way to trigger an investigation.
Template for investigating any Datadog alert. Replace the placeholder values with your actual alert data.
Creates a new investigation thread. The thread_id is automatically saved to the collection variable for use in subsequent requests.
Triggers an investigation on the created thread. Returns the investigation result with root cause, evidence, and remediation steps.
Retrieves the full state of a thread including all runs and the latest result.
Chat mode: ask questions about incidents or infrastructure without triggering a full investigation.
